zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏弱整理格局
zh.content:
以太坊短线整体呈震荡偏弱格局，价格围绕1575-1581窄幅整理，短期动能不足，市场方向未明，需等待有效突破确认。谨慎观望

技术指标显示MACD为负值-1.53345，动能偏空，价格略低于SMA20均线1579附近，短期反弹力度有限。整体承压运行

支撑位关注1575及1570整数关口，若失守或下探1565区域；阻力位1579及1581一线，突破才有延续上行空间。关注反应

交易策略建议以区间操作为主，靠近1575附近可轻仓试多，反弹至1579-1581区间逐步减仓，跌破支撑则止损观望。控制风险

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently trading near 1576.49, hovering just below the 20-period simple moving average at 1579.01, which suggests a mildly bearish short-term structure. The narrow trading range between 1575.69 and 1581.14 indicates a period of consolidation following recent selling pressure. Price action remains compressed, and unless ETH can establish sustained momentum above the moving average, the market is likely to remain vulnerable to further downside testing.

The available momentum indicators reinforce a cautious outlook. The MACD value of -1.53345 reflects persistent bearish momentum, although the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of trend strength. With the RSI(14) unavailable, price positioning relative to the moving average and recent intraday behavior become more important. The inability to reclaim the SMA(20) suggests that buyers currently lack sufficient conviction to initiate a stronger recovery phase.

From a technical perspective, immediate support appears around 1575.00, closely aligned with the session low. A decisive break below this zone could expose Ethereum to further downside pressure toward the 1565.00-1558.00 area. On the upside, resistance is developing near 1580.00-1582.00, with stronger resistance emerging around 1590.00. A breakout above these levels would improve the short-term technical outlook and potentially attract renewed buying interest.

For traders, the current environment favors a disciplined and risk-managed approach. Short-term traders may consider range-trading strategies while price remains confined between support and resistance boundaries. Momentum traders should wait for confirmation through either a breakout above 1582.00 or a breakdown below 1575.00 before initiating larger positions. Given the subdued volatility and mixed signals, maintaining smaller position sizes and applying strict stop-loss management remains advisable.
